'''Light tactical fighters''' were [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] carried aboard [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']] when [[Bogga]] owned the ship.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-03-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''
